MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Steven B. Eggleston, Esq. of LOPEZ HODES RESTAINO MILMAN SKIKOR & POLOS for failure to file Proof of service of order granting motion to withdraw as atty. is ordered off calendar. (Appeal Pending). Court ordered OSC off calendar. A Status and Setting Conference is scheduled on 6/28/02 at 9:00 AM, in department 212. Court to give notice. Proceedings reported by: Patricia M. Evezich. (212)

Off Calendar Jan-02-2002 Continued To Jan-31-02 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Steven Eggleston, Esq., for failure to file proof of service on Order
Granting Motion to Withdraw as Attorney of Record is heard this day.
There being no appearance or a response to the Order to Show Cause filed, court ordered Steven Eggleston, Esq., sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to
1/31/2002 at 10:30 AM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon. (212)
